mapper.select: select scd.common_cd as code, scd.common_nm as name from sys_common_detail scd left join sys_common_master scm on scm.sys_id = scd.link_sys_id where 1=1 and scm.common_cd = #{code} and scm.delete_yn = 'N' and scm.use_yn = 'Y' and scd.delete_yn = 'N' and scd.use_yn = 'Y'
select plant_cd as code, plant_nm as name from sys_plant sp where 1=1 and delete_yn = 'N' and use_yn = 'Y'
